title: Pale Arsenal
description: A mod that adds new equipment to enhance combat.
body:
Pale Arsenal is a combat mod inspired by the Content SMP. It adds a new material that can craft an armor set and two weapons. 

Pale Ore can be found at y -55 and below and can be mined with a Diamond Pickaxe or higher. This material is essential to crafting the mod's equipment. 
Smelting Raw Pale Ore yields Refined Pale Ore. 2 Netherite Scraps and 2 Refined Pale Ore can be crafted together to create a Palesteel Ingot
These 3 materials can also be crafted into blocks. 

A Palesteel Sword can be crafted with 4 Palesteel Ingots and a Breeze Rod. 
It has 2 abilities: 
- Downslash - hitting an enemy from above while in the air will propel you upwards and grant a Charge (max 3)
- Dash - right-click to spend a Charge and perform a short dash

A Palesteel Chakram can be crafted with 4 Palesteel Ingots and a Breeze Rod. 
It can be thrown by right-clicking and spending a Charge. Throwing the Chakram at your feet launches you upwards. Charges restore every 2 seconds (max 3)

Palesteel Armor can be crafted the same way as other armor, but with Palesteel Ingots. 
It has a full set ability: 
- Flow - avoiding damage for 5 seconds grants Flow, a status effect that increases your attack and movement speed by 25% and reach by 1 block. Taking damage removes the effect.
